title: 9 PCS Zip Puller Replacement, Metal Zip Repair Puller, Removable Zip Replacement Puller for Clothes Purse Handbags Backpacks Suitcase Luggage
features: High-Quality Material: Our zip puller replacement is made from zinc alloy, which is durable, does not fade or warp easily, and can be applied repeatedly for a long time.
Detachable Design: Our zipper pull replacement is detachable, which means they can be fitted and removed very quickly, making them very convenient to use and saving you time.

Easy to Use: Our removable zipper puller are easy to install, with clearly visible small notches for buckles that can be pushed in without loosening and opened by pulling out. Installation only takes a few seconds.
Sufficient Quantity: There are 3 silver zip pullers, 3 gold zip pullers, and 3 black zip pullers in the pack, enough to cover your everyday repair and replacement needs.

Wide Range of Uses: Our universal replacement zipper pull is not only suitable for various clothing items but can also be applied on luggage, backpacks, handbags, wallets, and other items to quickly repair zips.
